findings.title: Container diagram shows PostgreSQL but code uses MongoDB
findings.code_says: src/db/client.js connects to MongoDB via mongoose
findings.evidence: src/db/client.js:12 imports 'mongoose'; no postgres driver in package.json
findings.issue: C4 container diagram claims PostgreSQL but the code uses MongoDB.
findings.why_it_matters: Architecture docs misrepresent the system, misleading readers.
findings.suggested_fix: Update l2-c4-container.md to reflect MongoDB, or migrate to PostgreSQL.
